name: Sweet Matango Mushroom
descrip: An exceptionally scrumptious-looking mushroom from a toxic matango, sporting alluring cream-white and lavender-purple colors. Unlike a regular specimen, it looks edible and even quite tasty, suffused with the allure of its monster girl of origin... as well as her aphrodisiacs.
statusOutcome: |f|DamagePlayerFromMonster|/|Toxic Matango|/|Lecherous Kiss|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Lecherous Kiss|n|Eating the sweet-tasting mushroom, you can't hold back a sigh as you feel enticing aphrodisiac pleasure spread through you... along with a feeling of enhanced attractiveness!
